name: JinFu Technology Co., Ltd.
summary: JinFu Technology Co., Ltd. primarily engages in the research, development, and processing of liquid crystal display modules, and intelligent detection and automation equipment in China and internationally. The company is also involved in the material processing of precision parts of electronic products. Its products are used in consumer electronics, automobiles, medical, new energy, and other industries. The company was founded in 1998 and is headquartered in Suzhou, China.
